title.en: A special team beats brilliant individuals - how silky Spain flattened France
title.zh-CN: 一个特殊的团队击败了杰出的个人-丝绸般的西班牙如何夷为平地

summary.en: Spain have rather flown under the radar at the 2026 World Cup - but will they go all the way and win it?
summary.zh-CN: 西班牙在2026年世界杯上相当低调，但他们会一路前进并赢得比赛吗？

title.en: Bellingham best player at World Cup - Rooney
title.zh-CN: 贝灵厄姆世界杯最佳球员-鲁尼

summary.en: Jude Bellingham has been the best player at the World Cup so far, says former England striker Wayne Rooney.
summary.zh-CN: 前英格兰前锋韦恩·鲁尼（ Wayne Rooney ）表示，裘德·贝灵汉姆（ Jude Bellingham ）是迄今为止世界杯上

title.en: What happened to David Batty, who shook off penalty miss against Argentina?
title.zh-CN: 大卫·巴蒂（ David Batty ）摆脱了对阿根廷的点球失误，发生了什么事？

summary.en: England midfielder David Batty quickly shook off his penalty miss against Argentina in 1998. As the two teams prepare to meet in the World Cup knockout stage again, BBC Sport asks: what happened to...
summary.zh-CN: 1998年，英格兰中场大卫·巴蒂（ David Batty ）迅速摆脱了对阿根廷的点球失误。当两支球队准备在世界杯淘汰赛阶段再次见面时， BBC Sport询问：发生了什么......

title.en: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 38
title.zh-CN: 我是谁？猜猜世界杯明星38号

summary.en: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?
summary.zh-CN: 你会在尽可能少的尝试中获得今天的玩家吗？

title.en: All the goals from England's 2026 World Cup campaign so far
title.zh-CN: 到目前为止，英格兰2026年世界杯的所有进球

summary.en: As England gear up to face Norway at the Miami Stadium for the World Cup quarter-finals, re-live all the goals that got Thomas Tuchel's side there.
summary.zh-CN: 随着英格兰队准备在迈阿密体育场迎战挪威队，参加世界杯四分之一决赛，重温托马斯·图切尔在那里的所有进球。

title.en: All of Argentina's goals from the World Cup so far
title.zh-CN: 到目前为止，阿根廷在世界杯上的所有进球

summary.en: Watch all 17 of Argentina's goals from World Cup 2026 on their way to the semi-final, where they face England.
summary.zh-CN: 观看阿根廷从2026年世界杯到半决赛的所有17个进球，在那里他们面对英格兰。

title.en: The 91-year-old Argentine journalist covering his 18th World Cup
title.zh-CN: 这位91岁的阿根廷记者报道了他的第18届世界杯

summary.en: Enrique Macaya Marquez has recovered every World Cup since 1958, where a 17-year-old Pele featured.
summary.zh-CN: 自1958年以来，恩里克·马卡亚·马尔克斯（ Enrique Macaya Marquez ）已经恢复了每届世界杯，其中一位17岁的贝利

title.en: Pressure is on world champions Argentina in semi-final - Guehi
title.zh-CN: 世界冠军阿根廷在半决赛中面临压力-盖希

summary.en: England defender Marc Guehi insists the pressure is on Argentina as the Three Lions prepare to face the reigning champions in the World Cup semi-finals.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰后卫马克·盖希（ Marc Guehi ）坚持认为，随着三狮队准备在世界杯半决赛中面对卫冕冠军，阿根廷面临着压力。

title.en: Spain into World Cup final with victory over France
title.zh-CN: 西班牙进入世界杯决赛，战胜法国

summary.en: Spain are into the 2026 World Cup final after goals from Mikel Oyarzabal and Pedro Porro see them convincingly beat France 2-0 in their semi-final in Dallas.
summary.zh-CN: 在米克尔·奥亚尔扎巴尔（ Mikel Oyarzabal ）和佩德罗·波罗（ Pedro Porro ）的进球后，西班牙队进入了2026年世界杯决赛，他们在达拉斯的半决赛中令人信服地以2比0击败

title.en: World Cup final half-time to last up to 25 minutes
title.zh-CN: 世界杯决赛半场持续时间长达25分钟

summary.en: The half-time break in Sunday's World Cup final is expected to last between 20 and 25 minutes.
summary.zh-CN: 周日世界杯决赛的中场休息预计将持续20至25分钟。

title.en: Henderson & Quansah only England absentees for Argentina
title.zh-CN: Henderson & Quansah仅限阿根廷的英格兰缺席者

summary.en: Jordan Henderson and Jarell Quansah are set to be the only players unavailable for England's World Cup semi-final against Argentina.
summary.zh-CN: 乔丹·亨德森（ Jordan Henderson ）和贾雷尔·昆萨（ Jarell Quansah ）将成为唯一无法参加英格兰世界杯半决赛对阵阿根廷队的球员。

title.en: Balogun expected controversy after World Cup ban waived
title.zh-CN: Balogun预计世界杯禁令放弃后会有争议

summary.en: United States striker Folarin Balogun knew the decision by Fifa to suspend his one-game ban at the World Cup was going to bring "a lot of controversy" and said it brought "nerves" on his team-mates.
summary.zh-CN: 美国前锋Folarin Balogun知道国际足联暂停他在世界杯上一场比赛禁赛的决定将带来“很多争议” ，并表示这给他的队友带来了“紧张”。

title.en: Barry's journey from Accrington Stanley to World Cup semi-final
title.zh-CN: Barry从Accrington Stanley到世界杯半决赛的旅程

summary.en: His playing career peaked at Accrington Stanley - now Anthony Barry is Thomas Tuchel's right-hand man in England's bid for World Cup glory.
summary.zh-CN: 他的职业生涯在Accrington Stanley达到顶峰-现在Anthony Barry是Thomas Tuchel在英格兰申办世界杯时的得力助手。

title.en: The origin story of France star Michael Olise
title.zh-CN: 法国明星迈克尔·奥利斯的起源故事

summary.en: The origin story of France star Michael Olise begins much closer to home than you might think.
summary.zh-CN: 法国明星迈克尔·奥利斯（ Michael Olise ）的起源故事比您想象的要离家近得多。

title.zh-CN: 英超联赛规则世界杯防守-但不是攻击

summary.en: After a poor season at Liverpool, Alexis Mac Allister is back thriving for Argentina - so what does his future look like at Anfield?

summary.en: London City Lionesses are set to sign France forward Kadidiatou Diani.
